channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: iPhone 17e vs Xiaomi 15T : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone haut de gamme « accessible » ?
item.description: Le milieu de gamme Xiaomi a-t-il ce qu'il faut pour se dresser face au « dernier iPhone » ? Voyons comment bien dépenser vos deniers dans ce nouveau comparatif.

item.title: Memorial Day Tech Deals: Sony, Anker, Beats (2026)
item.description: Lots of our most-recommended headphones, power banks, and other gadgets are on sale for Memorial Day.

item.title: Best Memorial Day Mattress Deals: Helix, Saatva (2026)
item.description: It’s one of the best times of the year to buy a mattress, and deals on our favorite models are in full swing.

item.title: Kalshi and Rhode Island sue each other in latest challenge to prediction markets
item.description: Rhode Island joins other states that have taken similar legal action.

item.title: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
item.description: Memorial Day is nearly here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your weekend plans involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of solar lights, as many of our favorite models are currently on sale. You can also find deals on everything […]

item.title: Prix mini, maxi data ou 5G+ illimitée : l’un de ces 3 forfaits sans engagement est fait pour vous
item.description: Cette semaine, Free, Lebara et SFR jouent chacun une carte différente : forfait complet, gros volume de data ou illimité en 5G+. Trois offres sans engagement, avec de vrais arguments à faire valoir selon le besoin.

item.title: On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
item.description: Hiking is one of life's great joys. Turning off the screens and stepping out into nature for an extended period of time, perhaps even several days, is rejuvenating. Unfortunately, as someone with two young kids and a bad back, I'm not really able to go backpacking anymore. So I often find myself trying to live […]

item.title: Apple’s latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
item.description: If you’re looking for a laptop that’ll still perform well several years from now, Apple’s latest MacBook Air is hard to beat. Now, in particular, is a good time to pick one up, as you can currently buy the 13-inch MacBook Air at Amazon in the run-up to Memorial Day with an M5 chip, 16GB […]

item.title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
item.description: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.

item.title: Amazon coupe les vieilles Kindle : voici comment continuer à charger des livres sans racheter de liseuse
item.description: Depuis le 20 mai 2026, Amazon a coupé l'accès au Kindle Store sur douze modèles de liseuses sortis avant 2013. Bonne nouvelle : ces appareils ne sont pas morts, et on peut continuer à les remplir de livres sans passer par Amazon.

item.title: The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 smart glasses just got their first-ever discount in the Memorial Day sales
item.description: The latest Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 smart glasses just got their first-ever discount in this year's Memorial Day sales.

item.title: La photo de la semaine : un astronaute attendait un cargo spatial, il a vu tout autre chose traverser l’atmosphère !
item.description: Alors qu’il attendait l’arrivée d’un cargo russe, un astronaute de la Station spatiale internationale (ISS) a capturé un étrange objet lumineux se désintégrant dans l’atmosphère terrestre. Météore ou débris spatial ? Même la Nasa hésite encore.
